Every day, WITI’s group chats buzz with fresh links. As part of our Saturday send for paid readers, we round up some of the best. And this time, we asked subscribers in our chat [ https://substack.com/redirect/0feba40b-7b58-4361-ae4c-4db28044c57f?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] what they’ve enjoyed this week—thanks to all who contributed! 
It’s WITI, on the weekend.
McDonald’s touchscreen kiosks were feared as job killers. Instead, something surprising happened [ https://substack.com/redirect/eb9a18f6-6b86-44bb-a78d-36a5d3137d6a?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ]. (CNN)
For one thing, customers are ordering more than they ever would at the cash register.
The Skillet [ https://substack.com/redirect/ecf06ac1-313c-423d-bb29-51b6f46a889f?j=eyJ1IjoiOG81NG4ifQ.6oeetudtJEh-zO1onUJvtadWEdbodFIw0h4xbugrh1o ] (The Bitter Southerner)
On evacuations, skillets, and responsibility.
